genres.name: Indie Rock
genres.description: Guitar-driven independent rock, from lo-fi bedroom recordings to expansive post-rock.

genres.name: Electronic
genres.description: Broad electronic music category, including house, techno, IDM, and synth-driven styles.

genres.name: Ambient
genres.description: Textural, atmospheric music focused on tone and mood over traditional structure.

genres.name: Experimental Electronic
genres.description: Boundary-pushing electronic sounds, noise, and avant-garde production techniques.

genres.name: Hip-Hop
genres.description: Beats, rhymes, and sample-driven productions across classic and modern styles.

genres.name: Jazz
genres.description: Improvisational music ranging from classic acoustic ensembles to modern fusion.

shipping_methods.name: Economy Mail
shipping_methods.description: Lowest-cost untracked shipping for domestic orders. Best for budget-conscious deliveries.

shipping_methods.name: Standard Shipping
shipping_methods.description: Tracked domestic shipping with a balanced cost and delivery time.

shipping_methods.name: Express Courier
shipping_methods.description: Fastest domestic option with full tracking and insurance coverage.

shipping_methods.name: International Tracked
shipping_methods.description: Tracked shipping for international orders with customs-ready documentation.

promo_codes.description: 10% off album orders between $50 and $70. Applies to music formats only.
Get $5 off shipping on any vinyl order over $40.
5% off all pre-order items in a single transaction.

payment_methods.name: Credit / Debit Card
payment_methods.description: Pay securely now using a major credit or debit card. Supports Visa, Mastercard, and American Express.

payment_methods.name: Pay on Release
payment_methods.description: Reserve upcoming pre-order items now and only pay when the release ships.

releases.title: Aurora Echoes
releases.description: Shimmering synth soundscapes and slow-building electronic crescendos recorded live to tape.

releases.title: Midnight Parade
releases.description: Nocturnal guitar riffs and neon-lit drum machines march through late-night cityscapes.

releases.title: Noir Signals
releases.description: Darkwave pulses, saturated tape hiss, and glitchy transmissions from an imagined future.

releases.title: Future Waveforms
releases.description: High-energy synth explorations and rhythm-forward experiments for late-night headphone sessions.

releases.title: Dream Loops
releases.description: Soft-focus tape loops and slowly evolving drones for deep listening and sleep rituals.

releases.title: Neon Gardens
releases.description: Hooks, jangly guitars, and shimmering reverb-heavy choruses inspired by late-90s indie.

releases.title: Rooftop Static
releases.description: Live-in-the-room indie rock tracking the sounds of late summer rooftops and distant traffic.

releases.title: City Grid
releases.description: A kinetic blend of techno, house, and electro tracing a day in a fictional megacity.

releases.title: Oscillations
releases.description: Warm analog synth patterns and propulsive drum programming for late-night drives.

releases.title: Spectrum Lines
releases.description: Phase-shifted arpeggios and fractured beats tracing the edges of club experimentation.

releases.title: Inner Tides: Ambient Compilation
releases.description: Label-wide ambient compilation featuring long-form pieces from across the roster.

releases.title: Lo-Fi Sessions Vol. 1
releases.description: Dusty beats, mellow keys, and vinyl crackle designed for deep-focus sessions.

releases.title: Synth Diaries
releases.description: Daily modular synth sketches stitched into a surprisingly cohesive narrative.

releases.title: Night Bus
releases.description: Late-night downtempo sketches inspired by cross-city bus rides and sodium streetlights.

releases.title: Analog Skies
releases.description: Live trio improvisations processed through analog delays and spring reverbs.

releases.title: Night Drive
releases.description: A driving electro single built around a rubbery bassline and neon synth stabs.

releases.title: Attic Tapes EP
releases.description: Raw four-track demos recorded straight to cassette in a creaky old attic.

releases.title: Hinterland
releases.description: Four slow-moving pieces inspired by foggy mornings and distant hills.

releases.title: Label Sampler 2022
releases.description: A cross-genre introduction to the label, spanning noisy rock to sleek club tracks.

artists.name: Neon Parks
artists.bio: Neon Parks is a four-piece indie rock band blending jangly guitars, vintage synths, and bittersweet harmonies inspired by late-90s college radio.

artists.name: Midnight Arcade
artists.bio: Midnight Arcade fuses driving post-punk basslines with neon-drenched synth leads, channeling the feeling of wandering a city after midnight.

artists.name: Aurora Lines
artists.bio: Aurora Lines sculpts widescreen ambient and electronic pieces from modular synths, reel-to-reel loops, and field recordings from the far north.

artists.name: Noir Channel
artists.bio: Noir Channel is a shadowy electronic project focused on VHS-smeared textures, slow-burn rhythms, and noir-inspired atmospheres.

artists.name: Spectral Echo
artists.bio: Spectral Echo crafts high-energy electronic tracks where intricate drum programming meets shimmering pads and distant vocal fragments.

artists.name: Drift State
artists.bio: Drift State specializes in long-form ambient works built from tape loops, bowed guitars, and softly detuned synth chords.

artists.name: Rooftop Poets
artists.bio: Rooftop Poets record blown-out indie rock anthems on rooftops and in warehouses, favoring first takes and room noise over polish.

artists.name: City Program
artists.bio: City Program maps out a fictional megacity through tightly programmed techno, house, and electro instrumentals.

artists.name: Phase Shift
artists.bio: Phase Shift explores warm analog synth patterns and polyrhythmic drums, nodding equally to classic IDM and modern club music.

artists.name: Prism Sequence
artists.bio: Prism Sequence bends dance-floor structures into off-kilter shapes, working at the edge between club music and abstraction.

artists.name: Various Artists
artists.bio: A placeholder artist used for label-wide compilations featuring multiple members of the roster.

artists.name: Lo-Fi Vibes
artists.bio: Lo-Fi Vibes delivers dusty, laid-back hip-hop instrumentals built from chopped samples, soft keys, and vinyl crackle.

artists.name: Synth Diaries
artists.bio: Synth Diaries is a solo project documenting daily modular patches, from fragile melodies to chaotic noise storms.

artists.name: Night Bus
artists.bio: Night Bus creates hazy downtempo and ambient tracks inspired by late-night journeys through empty streets.

artists.name: Analog Skies
artists.bio: Analog Skies is a trio blending jazz improvisation with analog delay lines and spring reverbs for a hazy, cosmic sound.

artists.name: Night Drive
artists.bio: Night Drive focuses on sleek electro and synthwave singles tailor-made for late-night highway runs.

artists.name: Attic Recordings
artists.bio: Attic Recordings is a lo-fi indie project tracking fragile songs straight to cassette in a cramped attic studio.

artists.name: Hinterland Drift
artists.bio: Hinterland Drift composes slow-moving ambient pieces inspired by rural landscapes and foggy mornings.

artists.name: Label Roster
artists.bio: A collective artist name used for label samplers and joint projects featuring multiple acts from the catalog.
